parameters.jsCode: const crypto=require('crypto'),i=$json,p=i.payload||{},ep=i.episode_id||p.episode_id,shot=i.shot_id||p.shot_id||null,a=i.action||'run',v=Number(i.generation_version||1);if(!i.project_id||!ep)throw new Error('STORYBOARD_NOT_FOUND');if(a==='regenerate'&&v<2)throw new Error('BUSINESS_VALIDATION_FAILED: regenerate requires new version');return [{json:{...i,episode_id:ep,shot_id:shot,payload:p,stage:'storyboard_images',action:a,generation_version:v,trace_id:i.trace_id||`trace_frame_${crypto.randomUUID()}`,task_id:`task_${crypto.randomUUID()}`,idempotency_key:[i.project_id,'storyboard_images',shot||ep,v,a].join(':'),started_ms:Date.now()}}];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO drama.workflow_tasks(task_id,trace_id,project_id,workflow_stage,action,entity_type,entity_id,generation_version,idempotency_key,status,max_retries,input_data,started_at)VALUES($1,$2,$3,'storyboard_images',$4,$5,$6,$7,$8,'running',$9,$10::jsonb,now())ON CONFLICT(idempotency_key)DO UPDATE SET status=CASE WHEN drama.workflow_tasks.status='failed'AND $4 IN('retry','resume')AND drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count<drama.workflow_tasks.max_retries THEN'running'ELSE drama.workflow_tasks.status END,retry_count=CASE WHEN drama.workflow_tasks.status='failed'AND $4 IN('retry','resume')THEN drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count+1 ELSE drama.workflow_tasks.retry_count END RETURNING status,output_data,$11::jsonb request;

SELECT sh.*,b.storyboard_id,b.version storyboard_version,st.style_id,st.positive_prompt style_prompt,st.negative_prompt style_negative,st.aspect_ratio,st.resolution_width,st.resolution_height,coalesce((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('character_id',p.character_id,'profile_id',p.profile_id,'base_prompt',p.base_prompt,'negative_prompt',p.negative_prompt,'asset_id',a.asset_id,'reference_url',a.storage_url,'costume_id',co.costume_id,'costume_prompt',co.costume_prompt))FROM drama.character_visual_profiles p LEFT JOIN LATERAL(SELECT * FROM drama.generated_assets WHERE profile_id=p.profile_id AND selected_as_primary AND review_status='approved'AND status='succeeded'LIMIT 1)a ON true LEFT JOIN LATERAL(SELECT * FROM drama.character_costumes WHERE profile_id=p.profile_id AND lock_status='locked'AND review_status='approved'ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1)co ON true WHERE p.project_id=sh.project_id AND p.lock_status='locked'AND p.review_status='approved'AND p.character_id IN(SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(sh.character_ids))),'[]')characters,(SELECT jsonb_build_object('location_id',p.location_id,'profile_id',p.profile_id,'base_prompt',p.base_prompt,'negative_prompt',p.negative_prompt,'asset_id',a.asset_id,'reference_url',a.storage_url)FROM drama.location_visual_profiles p LEFT JOIN LATERAL(SELECT * FROM drama.generated_assets WHERE profile_id=p.profile_id AND selected_as_primary AND review_status='approved'AND status='succeeded'LIMIT 1)a ON true WHERE p.project_id=sh.project_id AND p.location_id=sh.location_id AND p.lock_status='locked'AND p.review_status='approved'ORDER BY p.version DESC LIMIT 1)location FROM drama.storyboards b JOIN drama.storyboard_shots sh ON sh.storyboard_id=b.storyboard_id JOIN drama.episode_scripts es ON es.script_id=b.script_id JOIN LATERAL(SELECT * FROM drama.visual_styles WHERE project_id=b.project_id AND status IN('approved','locked')ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1)st ON true WHERE b.project_id=$1 AND b.episode_id=$2 AND b.status='approved'AND es.status='approved'AND sh.status IN('approved','ready')AND($3::text IS NULL OR sh.shot_id=$3)AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM drama.storyboard_images i WHERE i.shot_id=sh.shot_id AND i.review_status='approved'AND i.is_current)ORDER BY sh.shot_order LIMIT $4;

nodes.name: Load Approved Shots and Locked Assets

parameters.jsCode: const r=$('Restore Request').first().json,rows=$input.all().map(x=>x.json);if(!rows.length)throw new Error('STORYBOARD_NOT_APPROVED: no eligible approved shots');let missingChars=[],missingLocs=[];for(const s of rows){const got=new Set((s.characters||[]).filter(x=>x.asset_id&&x.costume_id).map(x=>x.character_id));for(const id of s.character_ids||[])if(!got.has(id))missingChars.push(id);if(s.location_id&&(!s.location||!s.location.asset_id))missingLocs.push(s.location_id);}missingChars=[...new Set(missingChars)];missingLocs=[...new Set(missingLocs)];if(($env.REQUIRE_LOCKED_ASSETS||'true')==='true'&&(missingChars.length||missingLocs.length)){const e=new Error('REQUIRED_ASSETS_NOT_LOCKED: '+JSON.stringify({missing_character_ids:missingChars,missing_location_ids:missingLocs,missing_costume_ids:[]}));throw e;}return rows.map(s=>{const refs=[...(s.characters||[]).map(x=>x.asset_id),s.location?.asset_id].filter(Boolean),charText=(s.characters||[]).map(x=>`${x.base_prompt}；当前服装：${x.costume_prompt}`).join('；'),prompt=[s.style_prompt,`${s.aspect_ratio}，${s.resolution_width}x${s.resolution_height}`,s.location?.base_prompt,`灯光：${s.lighting}，气氛：${s.atmosphere}`,charText,`动作与表情：${s.action_description}，${s.facial_expression}`,`镜头：${s.shot_size}，${s.camera_angle}，${s.camera_motion}，${s.composition}`,`连续性：${JSON.stringify(s.continuity_notes)}`,'高质量短剧关键帧，无文字无水印'].filter(Boolean).join('。');return {json:{...r,shot:s,reference_asset_ids:refs,reference_urls:[...(s.characters||[]).map(x=>x.reference_url),s.location?.reference_url].filter(Boolean),final_prompt:prompt,negative_prompt:[s.style_negative,...(s.characters||[]).map(x=>x.negative_prompt),s.location?.negative_prompt,'字幕，气泡，文字，水印，Logo'].filter(Boolean).join('，')}}});

nodes.name: Validate Locks and Build Final Prompts

parameters.query: WITH a AS(INSERT INTO drama.generated_assets(asset_id,project_id,asset_type,entity_type,entity_id,generation_version,provider,model,provider_task_id,prompt,negative_prompt,request_parameters,reference_asset_ids,reference_image_urls,seed,status,original_url,storage_url,width,height,content_hash)VALUES($3,$4,'storyboard_frame','storyboard_shot',$1,$2,$5,$6,$7,$8,$9,$10::jsonb,$11::jsonb,$12::jsonb,$13,$14,$15,$16,$17,$18,$19)ON CONFLICT(asset_id)DO UPDATE SET status=excluded.status,original_url=excluded.original_url,storage_url=excluded.storage_url RETURNING asset_id),it AS(UPDATE drama.image_generation_tasks SET asset_id=$3 WHERE task_id=$20),im AS(INSERT INTO drama.storyboard_images(storyboard_image_id,project_id,episode_id,storyboard_id,shot_id,generation_version,source_storyboard_version,visual_style_id,character_profile_ids,costume_ids,location_profile_id,reference_asset_ids,final_prompt,negative_prompt,provider,model,seed,image_asset_id,image_url,storage_url,status,auto_qc_status,auto_qc_report,review_status,is_current)VALUES($21,$4,$22,$23,$1,$2,$24,$25,$26::jsonb,$27::jsonb,$28,$11::jsonb,$8,$9,$5,$6,$13,$3,$15,$16,$29,$30,$31::jsonb,'pending',true)ON CONFLICT(shot_id,generation_version)DO UPDATE SET status=excluded.status,image_url=excluded.image_url,storage_url=excluded.storage_url,auto_qc_status=excluded.auto_qc_status,auto_qc_report=excluded.auto_qc_report RETURNING storyboard_image_id),rv AS(INSERT INTO drama.review_tasks(review_id,project_id,stage,entity_type,entity_id,review_status,metadata)SELECT $32,$4,'storyboard_image','storyboard_image',$21,'pending',jsonb_build_object('shot_id',$1,'generation_version',$2)WHERE $29='succeeded'AND $30<>'failed'ON CONFLICT(review_id)DO NOTHING)SELECT $21::text storyboard_image_id;

SELECT count(*)::int task_count,count(*)FILTER(WHERE status='succeeded')::int success_count,count(*)FILTER(WHERE status IN('failed','timeout'))::int failed_count FROM drama.storyboard_images WHERE project_id=$1 AND episode_id=$2 AND generation_version=$3;

WITH p AS(UPDATE drama.projects SET current_stage='storyboard_image_review',status='waiting_storyboard_image_review'WHERE project_id=$1),t AS(UPDATE drama.workflow_tasks SET status=$2,output_data=$3::jsonb,error_code=$4,error_message=$5,completed_at=now()WHERE idempotency_key=$6)SELECT $3::jsonb response;
